title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 32
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear an announcement about the homework group.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: Please listen carefully if you are joining the homework group today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the library, but the tables are being moved. Others may wait near the computer room, although another class booked it. [1]Everyone should go straight to the room eleven after lunch[/1]. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Please listen carefully if you are joining the homework group today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the library, but the tables are being moved. Others may wait near the computer room, although another class booked it. Everyone should go straight to the room eleven after lunch. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

questions.question: Where will the homework group be today?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, students at library tables, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, students doing homework in a classroom, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, students using computers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The announcement says everyone should go straight to the room eleven.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about something broken in a bedroom.
questions.audio_script: Man: Something is broken in the bedroom, but I am not sure what. Is it the lamp? || Woman: No, the bulb is new. || Man: Maybe it is the desk chair. || Woman: I checked that too, and it only needs moving. [1]The problem is the alarm clock, because it stopped during the night[/1]. || Man: We should tell someone before it gets worse. || Woman: I already wrote a note, and I will show it to Dad when he gets home. || Woman: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

dialogue.text: Something is broken in the bedroom, but I am not sure what. Is it the lamp?

dialogue.text: No, the bulb is new.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Maybe it is the desk chair.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I checked that too, and it only needs moving. The problem is the alarm clock, because it stopped during the night.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: We should tell someone before it gets worse.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I already wrote a note, and I will show it to Dad when he gets home.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two friends talking about a visit to a summer fair.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What did you do at the summer fair last weekend? I thought you wanted to try cake stall. || Girl: I did, but it sold out early. || Woman: Did you do puppet show instead? || Girl: No, because it was for younger children. In the end, [1]I spent most of the afternoon doing street dance[/1]. It was better than I expected. || Woman: I might come next time. || Girl: You should. The helpers were friendly, and everything was easy to understand. || Girl: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

dialogue.text: I might come next time.

dialogue.speaker: girl

questions.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on a school sports day.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Are you ready for the school sports day tomorrow? I was going to pack a scarf, because that seemed useful. || Girl: I read the message from school again. You do not need that. || Boy: What about a running shoes? || Girl: Not really. [1]The teacher says everyone should bring a water bottle because there is nowhere to buy drinks near the field[/1]. || Boy: Thanks. I will put it in my bag now, before I forget. || Girl: Good plan. We have to leave early in the morning.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the sports centre.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the sports centre tomorrow? I thought you were going to cycle. || Boy: I was, but my bike light is broken. || Man: Could you use the taxi instead? || Boy: I checked, but it costs too much. [1]I am going to take the bus because it stops outside the main door[/1]. || Man: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Boy: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Boy: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food at a restaurant.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Have you chosen what to eat at the restaurant? The queue is moving quickly now. || Man: I nearly chose the pizza, and I also looked at the fish pie. || Woman: They both look fine to me. || Man: Maybe, but we had pizza yesterday and the fish pie is finished. [1]I am going to have the vegetable pasta[/1]. It should be enough before we leave. || Woman: Good choice. I will order mine after you, and then we can sit near the window. || Woman: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost lunch box.
questions.audio_script: Man: Did you find your lunch box? You looked everywhere this morning. || Woman: Not at first. I went back to the science lab, because I remembered showing my project there. || Man: What about the playground? You were there later. || Woman: I checked, but it was not there. Then my teacher called and said [1]my lunch box was inside the classroom cupboard[/1]. I must have left it there before school. || Man: That is lucky. You need it today, don't you? || Woman: Yes, I'll collect it before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you find your lunch box? You looked everywhere this morning.

dialogue.speaker: woman

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What about the playground? You were there later.

dialogue.text: Yes, I'll collect it before lunch.
